violations.text: Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the kitchen by window pass. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Soap was provided during the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2026

Elote topping and kimchi topping was observed held at 50 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Food items were placed on ice less than 20 minutes prior to the time of inspection. Food items were placed into refrigeration to rapidly cool. Per PIC, establishment is ordering a condiment cooler for toppings to remain under mechanical refrigeration at all times. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2026

Employees' clothing or other personal belongings were observed stored in the prep and dry storage areas. Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2026

The mechanical dishwasher located in the kitchen area was observed to leaking into a bucket and was not in good repair. Equipment shall be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/12/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the 2-door reach-in in the kitchen have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment shall be cleaned at a frequency necessary to prevent the accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 10/29/2025

Food service pans in the kitchen are displayed with the lip surface up. Utensils and food service items are to be stored so that the handles or food contact surfaces are not exposed to potential contamination. Pans were inverted during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2025

The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine for the kitchen. Establishment is to obtain thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for dish machine. New Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2025

The cutting boards on the prep unit are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 10/26/2024
